branches.title: The process and the completed works

items.title: Technique
items.body: From sketch to delivery, seven steps reveal how a single work is completed in the light of the workshop.

items.title: Collection
items.body: Championship, appointment, and bespoke forms are arranged as one bright gallery.

details.title: The structure changes at the fingertips
details.body: Depth in metal, engraved lines, and the direction of polish decide the finish of each work.

closing.title: Every step of the process becomes the reason for the work.

hero.title: THE PROCESS
hero.subtitle: Before a ring is complete, DEAHO's process passes through seven acts of inspection.

process.title: Seven steps behind a finished work
process.body: As the page scrolls, design, modeling, casting, setting, polishing, packaging, and delivery unfold like an anatomy of craft.

steps.label: DESIGN SKETCH
steps.title: Design sketch
steps.body: The team's symbols, names, and records are first arranged inside the structure of the ring.

steps.label: 3D MODELING
steps.title: 3D modeling
steps.body: The dimensional form and wearing feel are reviewed before the piece moves into production.

steps.label: CASTING
steps.title: Casting
steps.body: The planned form is translated into metal, establishing the work's core structure.

steps.label: STONE SETTING
steps.title: Stone setting
steps.body: Position and depth are tuned so the symbols stay clear inside the light.

steps.label: POLISHING
steps.title: Polishing
steps.body: Surface grain and reflection are refined to create the final brightness.

steps.label: PACKAGING
steps.title: Packaging
steps.body: The final state is arranged so the meaning stays intact until the work is received.

steps.label: DELIVERY
steps.title: Delivery
steps.body: The completed ring is delivered with its record and becomes the form of a moment.

details.title: Traces of the hand that mass production cannot replace
details.body: Inner engraving, carving depth, and mirror polish are detail standards that must be checked and adjusted by hand.

items.title: Inner engraving
items.body: Depth and spacing are tuned so names and records stay clear.

items.title: Carving depth
items.body: Layers are adjusted so symbols remain legible in light.

items.title: Mirror polish
items.body: The final polish completes both the impression and the wearing feel.

bespoke.title: A team's story inside the work
bespoke.body: A championship ring is not a repeated product. It is a bespoke work designed around symbols and season memories.

hero.subtitle: Championship, appointment, and bespoke forms are shown inside a bright gallery.

hero.subtitle: Reinterpreting the structure of golf as a singular object.

statement.body: The rhythm of a round, the line of a club, and the feeling on the wrist are arranged into one bright object.

heads.title: Choose your signature club
heads.subtitle: Select the club head form that best carries your playing identity.

items.label: Ball + Tee
items.caption: A symbolic head with ball and tee held together.

items.label: Iron
items.caption: A classic iron with a precise club line.

items.label: Putter
items.caption: A putter form shaped by the final touch on the green.

items.label: Wood
items.caption: A wood profile carrying the curve of distance.

shafts.title: Grip color on the wrist
shafts.subtitle: The color belongs to the bracelet grip, not the page background. Only contrast and texture shift inside the bright field.

items.label: BLACK
items.caption: The grip with the clearest contrast.

items.label: WHITE
items.caption: The lightest grip in the brightest setting.

items.label: BURGUNDY
items.caption: A grip echoing DEAHO's accent color.

items.label: NAVY
items.caption: A calm grip with a navy sensibility.

engraving.title: Engrave names, dates, and records
engraving.body: Scores, initials, dates, and course memories can be arranged on bright metal for a longer life.

lifestyle.title: A form beyond the round
lifestyle.body: As an object in its box and as a living piece on the wrist, the structure of golf remains longer.

hero.title: Shape the meaning of victory
hero.body: For appointment, championship, and bespoke inquiries, leave only contactable project information. No payment or card information is collected.

faqs.question: How are timelines and minimum quantities set?
faqs.answer: They are confirmed after reviewing the project scope and production specifications.

faqs.question: What should I prepare for bespoke work?
faqs.answer: Bring the symbols, records, budget range, and preferred timing. We will shape the rest together.

contact.name: Name
contact.success: Inquiry received. We will follow up through the contact you provided.
contact.fallback: If submission does not go through, use the direct contact details on this page.

golfInquiry.name: Name
golfInquiry.success: Inquiry received. We will contact you within 00 business days.
